description: Style noteA wallet is a subtle style essential, and every cosmopolitan man who knows the sartorial rights and wrongs needs a wallet like this one! This peter england wallet, with it stylish upper and practical, functional inner is an accessory must-have!Product DetailsTextured black upper with embossed branding on the front and a brown line running over the upperTwo main compartments and two slip pocketsA zipper on the spine of the wallet (inside)Three card holders on either sides of the foldMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 9 cm Width: 11 cm A wallet is a subtle style essential, and every cosmopolitan man who knows the sartorial rights and wrongs needs a wallet like this one! This Peter England wallet, with it stylish upper and practical, functional inner is an accessory must-have!
